fixtureActions.content:
# Soft38 Handoff36 Micro42 Contract

## Soft 38
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.38 with quality bias floor 0.36 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 36
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.36 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Micro 42
micro minContextUsageRatio defaults to 0.42 and minContentTokens to 5 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
